headline: IFF Explores the Science Behind Well-Being at In‑Cosmetics Global 2026
summary: PARIS, France, April 13, 2026--IFF (NYSE: IFF)—a global leader in flavors, fragrances, food ingredients and health & biosciences—will showcase scent and bioscience innovations focused on wellness and sustainability at In‑Cosmetics Global 2026, taking place April 14–16 at the Paris Expo Porte de Versailles.
